title: Research Atlas export contract inventory and snapshot schema v0
problem: Cards-only export cannot power a graph/atlas frontend; the repo lacks a documented contract inventory and a tested public atlas snapshot envelope for Research Atlas + Agent Lab planning.
acceptance_criteria: Repo inventory report lists DB tables, schema files, report/export shapes, public-site readers, golden coverage, safety classification, and Research Atlas gaps.
atlas_snapshot_v0.1.0 pydantic contract validates minimal fixture.
Unit tests cover validator fail-closed behavior and inventory sections.
No production export or public-site wiring changes.
Golden pass and full pytest pass.
Pre-ticket audit GO for medium-risk contract work.
non_goals: Atlas snapshot DB population or export CLI.
rollback_plan: Remove contracts module, inventory module, fixture, docs inventory, and tests only.
